name: River Raid
description: River Raid is a vertically scrolling shooter where the player pilots a fighter jet along a winding river. The objective is to fly as far as possible, destroying enemy bridges, ships, helicopters, and other aircraft while avoiding crashing into the riverbanks or running out of fuel. The river is procedurally generated, ensuring no two playthroughs are exactly alike. Fuel depots appear periodically along the river, and the player must fly directly over them to refuel. Destroying bridges allows passage further upriver, while failing to destroy them acts as a collision, potentially leading to the player's destruction. Enemies appear in varying patterns and increase in frequency and difficulty as the player progresses. The game ends when the player runs out of lives or crashes.

controls.arrow_up: Increase the speed of the aircraft.
controls.arrow_down: Decrease the speed of the aircraft.
controls.arrow_left: Move the aircraft horizontally to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the aircraft horizontally to the right.
